---
title: "`r if (exists('tmp')) tmp$mv$meta$label else 'Model Diagnostics'`"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    css: !expr system.file("rmd", "style.css", package = "modelVis")
    theme: cosmo
    includes:
      in_header: !expr system.file("rmd", "viewport.html", package = "modelVis")
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(plotly)
library(modelVis)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.height = 6,
  fig.width  = 9
)

# Retrieve data passed from mv_dashboard()
mv      <- tmp$mv
comp_mv <- tmp$comp_mv

# Convenience references
meta    <- mv$meta
years   <- meta$years
ages    <- meta$ages
fleets  <- meta$fleet_names
sexes   <- meta$sex_names
areas   <- meta$area_names

# Fleet type: 0 = survey, 1 = commercial
fleet_type <- if (!is.null(meta$fleet_type)) {
  meta$fleet_type
} else {
  rep(1L, length(fleets))
}
comm_fleets   <- fleets[fleet_type == 1]
survey_fleets <- fleets[fleet_type == 0]

# Flags for conditional sections
has_len    <- isTRUE(meta$has_length_comps)
has_disc   <- isTRUE(meta$has_discards)
has_mcmc   <- isTRUE(meta$has_mcmc)
has_comp   <- !is.null(comp_mv) && length(comp_mv) > 0
has_refpts <- !is.null(mv$ref_points)
has_refcrv <- !is.null(mv$ref_curves)
has_sr     <- !is.null(mv$sr_params) &&
              !is.null(mv$sr_params$reca)
```

```{r child_data, child=system.file("rmd", "child_data_summary.Rmd", package = "modelVis")}
```

```{r child_glance, child=system.file("rmd", "child_at_a_glance.Rmd", package = "modelVis")}
```

```{r child_index, child=system.file("rmd", "child_index_fits.Rmd", package = "modelVis")}
```

```{r child_catch, child=system.file("rmd", "child_catch_fits.Rmd", package = "modelVis")}
```

```{r child_age, child=system.file("rmd", "child_age_comps.Rmd", package = "modelVis"), eval=!is.null(mv$age_comp_fits)}
```

```{r child_len, child=system.file("rmd", "child_len_comps.Rmd", package = "modelVis"), eval=has_len}
```

```{r child_recruitment, child=system.file("rmd", "child_recruitment.Rmd", package = "modelVis")}
```

```{r child_sel, child=system.file("rmd", "child_selectivity.Rmd", package = "modelVis"), eval=!is.null(mv$selectivity_at_age)}
```

```{r child_lh, child=system.file("rmd", "child_life_history.Rmd", package = "modelVis"), eval=!is.null(mv$weight_at_age)}
```

```{r child_ref, child=system.file("rmd", "child_reference_pts.Rmd", package = "modelVis"), eval=has_refpts}
```

```{r child_lik, child=system.file("rmd", "child_likelihood.Rmd", package = "modelVis"), eval=!is.null(mv$likelihood_table)}
```

```{r child_optim, child=system.file("rmd", "child_optimisation.Rmd", package = "modelVis"), eval=!is.null(mv$fit_diagnostics)}
```

```{r child_diag, child=system.file("rmd", "child_diagnostics.Rmd", package = "modelVis"), eval=has_mcmc}
```

```{r child_comp, child=system.file("rmd", "child_comparison.Rmd", package = "modelVis"), eval=has_comp}
```
